scenarios.title: Coding assistant review correction
scenarios.query: Which Dakera REST endpoint should the coding assistant use for storing memory with reliability metadata?

memories.content: Dakera memory store examples should use POST /v1/memory/store for the current public REST API.

reliability.basis: Phase 1 runtime validation and maintainer review

memories.content: Dakera examples should use POST /v1/memories when storing agent memories.

reliability.basis: obsolete quickstart assumption superseded by current API behavior

scenarios.title: Research agent source conflict
scenarios.query: Should the research agent cite an unsupported secondary note as confirmed evidence?

memories.content: A research agent should prefer source-backed claims and cite the primary evidence when summarizing technical decisions.
A research agent can treat an uncited secondary note as confirmed evidence when it sounds plausible.

scenarios.title: Customer support outdated policy
scenarios.query: Which customer support policy should the agent reuse when an old process conflicts with the current escalation rule?

memories.content: Customer support agents should follow the current escalation policy and ask for verification when a prior policy conflicts.
Customer support agents should always use the old refund process without checking for newer escalation rules.

reliability.basis: outdated policy deliberately retained as contradiction evidence
